zh.lifeSummary: 當Maud Somery於大約1237年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾杜德利時，她的父親Sir Roger IV de Somery Baron of Dudley44歲，母親Nichole d'Aubigny28歲。她和William Henry de Erdington Lord of Shawbury至少有2個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1302年7月之前。

nameMeanings.name: Somery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Abelino, Adela, Alberto, Alfredo, Ana, Angel, Asuncion, Domingo, Elena, Emiliano, Emilio, Eusebio.
Spanish: possibly a habitational name from La Somera in Cuenca province, named from somero ‘shallow’. This surname is most common in the Philippines.

nameMeanings.name: Maud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular form of Matilda . This form was characteristically Low German (i.e. including medieval Dutch and Flemish). The wife of William the Conqueror , who bore this name, was the daughter of Baldwin , Count of Flanders. In Flemish and Dutch the letter -t- was generally lost when it occurred between vowels, giving forms such as Ma(h)auld. Maud or Matilda was also the name of the daughter ( 1102–67 ) of Henry I of England; she was married early in life to the Holy Roman Emperor Henry V , and later disputed the throne of England with her cousin Stephen . In 1128 she married Geoffrey , Count of Anjou. A medieval chronicler commented, ‘she was a good woman, but she had little bliss with him’. The name Maud became quite common in England in the 19th century, when its popularity was influenced in part by Tennyson's poem Maud, published in 1855 , but has not been much used since the early decades of the 20th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Maud Somery was born about 1237, in Dudley, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Roger IV de Somery Baron of Dudley, was 44 and her mother, Nichole d'Aubigny, was 28. She had at least 2 sons and 1 daughter with William Henry de Erdington Lord of Shawbury. She died before July 1302.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maud Somery est née environ 1237, à Dudley, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Roger IV de Somery Baron of Dudley, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Nichole d'Aubigny, avait 28 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille avec William Henry d’Erdington Lord of Shawbury. Elle est décédée avant juillet 1302.

ja.lifeSummary: Maud Someryが約1237年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアダドリーで生まれた時，父Sir Roger IV de Somery Baron of Dudleyは44歳，母Nichole d'Aubignyは28歳であった。彼女はWilliam Henry de Erdington Lord of Shawburyとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1302年7月以前に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Maud Somery(이)가 대략 1237년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 드들리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Roger IV de Somery Baron of Dudley(은)는 44세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Nichole d'Aubigny(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 William Henry de Erdington Lord of Shawbury(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1302년 7월 이전 사망했다.
